name: dsb-adp-punches-sync
title: DSB ADP Time & Labor Punches Sync
description: Pulls /time/v2/punches from ADP for a date window. Currently returns NOT_PROVISIONED (404) until the Time & Labor API product is enabled in ADP Marketplace. Once enabled, emits per-worker { first_in, last_out, total_hours, on_clock } records consumed by the ROLI Lead Pacer.
